cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out who ends up with what. So there's Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. They each start with a different colored present. Eve now has white present. Bob still has green present. Claire: black Dave: orange Third swap: Claire and Eve swap their gifts. Claire has black ball, Eve has white present. After swapping: Alice now has orange. Dave now has yellow. Others remain: Bob has green, Claire has white, Eve has black. Fifth swap: Bob and Eve swap their gifts. Bob has green, Eve has black. After swapping: Bob now has black. Eve now has green. So now, after all swaps, what does Eve have? According to the last step, Eve ends up with green. Let me check the options.
